channel.title: Blog on Techfeed
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Techfeed

item.title: My Top 5 Women Motivational Speakers in Cloud-Native Development in 2021
item.description: They are CNCF ambassadors, Docker captains, or AWS heroes. The women in tech are the game-changers of cloud-native development, sharing their knowledge about containers, Kubernetes, Docker, or DevOps topics. They inspire the new generation of girls entering into the STEM universe.

item.title: 10 concepts you should know about distributed systems
item.description: 1. Distributed System Before deep diving into concepts, let’s define what a distributed system is. The best definition is from Tim Berglund in an O’Reilly lesson: “distributed systems […] are a collection of independent computers that appears to its user as a single computer”.

item.title: ChangeBlogging my first Hacktoberfest 2021
item.description: ChangeBlogging my first Hacktoberfest 2021 How I discovered the vast open source world thanks to the Hackoberfest. Three weeks ago, while going through the last posts on Hashnode, I landed on Beginners’s guide to Hacktoberfest 2021 post from Ayushi Rawat.
